description: QA Update -MRP Mismatch - changed MRP from Rs.1600 to Rs.1399 as per the MRP on the product. footloose is the one stop shop for those who prefer reliable and quality bags. Carry your laptop in style with this Checkmate bag from Footloose. With ample space for office accessories as well as your laptop, the bag is best suited for office and general heavy duty use. Height: 37 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 15 cmMade of polyester with check print on the frontTwo zippered compartments and embroidered branding on the frontTwo main zippered compartments with organizer pouches and a keyholder in the firstClick lock straps to secure the main compartments furtherTwo zippered pockets on the sidesMeshed and padded back for ergonomic comfortAdjustable, padded shoulder strapsCare Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring
